onReport(bytes,bytes).details: Validates metadata then processes the settlement report.      Metadata layout (per Chainlink spec):        bytes32 workflowId | bytes10 workflowName | address workflowOwner | bytes2 reportId

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.auctionId: The auction this bond is for
params.depositor: Address that made the USDC transfer
params.logIndex: Log index within the tx (for idempotency)
params.txHash: Transaction hash of the bond transfer (for idempotency)

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

adminRefund(bytes32,uint256).notice: Emergency refund by admin (e.g., cancelled auction)

checkSolvency().notice: Solvency check: USDC balance >= totalBonded + totalWithdrawable

claimRefund(bytes32,uint256).notice: Non-winners claim their bond refund after settlement

getBondAmount(bytes32,uint256).notice: Get bond amount for paymaster lookup

onReport(bytes,bytes).notice: Called by KeystoneForwarder with CRE workflow report

recordBond(bytes32,uint256,address,uint2.notice: Record a bond deposit (called by admin/platform after observing on-chain transfer)

setExpectedWorkflowId(bytes32).notice: Configure expected CRE workflow parameters (called after CRE registration)

withdraw(uint256,address).notice: Agent withdraws accumulated balance to a specified address
